name: better-reviews-for-amazon
description: Shared TypeScript source for Better Reviews for Amazon userscript and browser extensions.
author: Vitalii Rizo (https://github.com/vrizo)

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:all
scripts.build:all: npm run build:userscript && npm run build:extensions && npm run build:icons && npm run build:manifests
scripts.build:release: npm run clean && npm run build:all && node ./scripts/build-release.mjs
